name: libclass-inspector-perl
title: libclass-inspector-perl
summary: Perl module that provides information about classes
description:
Perl module that provides information about classes
Class::Inspector allows you to get information about a loaded class.
Most or all of this information can be found in other ways, but they
aren't always very friendly, and usually involve a relatively high level
of Perl wizardry, or strange and unusual looking code. Class::Inspector
attempts to provide an easier, more friendly interface to this
information.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libclass-inspector-perl because Perl module that provides information about classes.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libclass-inspector-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libclass-inspector-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libclass-inspector-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
